extraction.one_line_summary: KWIATKOWSKI attacked inside 200m on steep finish climb after CARAPAZ's early move from 700m failed, delivering Sky stage win.
tactical_patterns: CARAPAZ attacking from 700m on steep finish overcooked effort; riders waiting until 200m prevailed despite smaller acceleration window.
Sky positioned KWIATKOWSKI behind early moves, exploiting tactical patience while CARAPAZ exhausted himself leading out TEUNS inadvertently.
Quick-Step controlled tempo with DE PLUS after CARAPAZ caught, preventing counterattacks until KWIATKOWSKI's late acceleration bypassed their leadout.

rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: misjudged effort distribution, attacking 700m out on steep finish left him vulnerable to late accelerations
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: positive: demonstrated restraint and positioning discipline, winning from wheels after rivals overextended early
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: neutral: marked CARAPAZ's early move but couldn't accelerate when effort faltered at 400m remaining
rider_signals.DE PLUS Laurens: positive: Quick-Step deployed him to control tempo after CARAPAZ caught, positioning teammates for sprint
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: positioned well in final 500m group but lacked punch on extreme gradient finish
